serverInfo.name: kindex
serverInfo.title: Kindex
serverInfo.description: Persistent knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Google Antigravity, OpenCode, Cursor, and other AI-assisted workflows. Hybrid FTS5 + graph retrieval, context tiers, operational guardrails, session tags, reminders with headless Codex/OpenCode wakeups, agent-specific configuration, lifecycle adapters, dream-cycle consolidation, git-tracked .kin project context, and opt-in work policy enforcement.

transport.note: Kindex runs locally over stdio. Install with `pip install kindex[mcp]`, `uv tool install kindex[mcp]`, or `uvx --from kindex[mcp] kin-mcp`, then register `kin-mcp` with your MCP client. No public HTTP transport is exposed.

summary: Knowledge capture, edit, supersede, learn, and linking
Multi-agent coordination, advisory locks, standing messages, and watches
Time-based reminders with shell actions, Claude instructions, and headless Codex/OpenCode wakeups
Mode primers, graph health, analytics, imports, exports, and ingestion adapters
